title: Ship enterprise procurement acquisition surfaces and buyer-review content
summary: Records release evidence for the new enterprise-procurement landing page, the procurement-focused generic dashboard comparison page, and the buyer-review blog that ties release history, access controls, and customer usage into enterprise approval workflows.
completed_todo_items: Ship 2 practical blog posts every sprint
Keep release-history generation tied to release evidence for meaningful public launches

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the new enterprise-procurement landing page, procurement comparison page, homepage discovery links, and buyer-review blog route all render from the production build and remain in the public release-history pipeline.
Confirms the enterprise-procurement acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcements and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the enterprise-procurement landing page, procurement comparison entry, buyer-review blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
